Home›Services› Incident Response
Service

Incident Response &
Digital Forensics

When a breach occurs, decisive action is critical. Our practice delivers rapid, senior-led response — from initial containment through full recovery — with forensic documentation that withstands legal and regulatory scrutiny.

When Every Hour Counts

Security incidents demand immediate, experienced leadership. Whether an organization is facing ransomware, business email compromise, a cloud intrusion, or a sophisticated nation-state adversary — our team is available around the clock to lead the response.

Our practice has managed incidents at Fortune 50 scale and for organizations of every size. The methodology is consistent: contain the threat, preserve evidence, eradicate the adversary, and restore operations — executed with the precision and discretion that high-stakes situations require.

Capabilities

  • Ransomware containment, negotiation advisory, and recovery operations
  • Business email compromise (BEC) investigation and remediation
  • Cloud intrusion response across AWS, Azure, GCP, and Microsoft 365
  • Advanced persistent threat (APT) identification and eviction
  • Forensic disk, memory, and network analysis
  • Malware reverse engineering and indicator extraction
  • Evidence preservation with defensible chain of custody protocols
  • Regulatory notification guidance across HIPAA, PCI, and state breach laws
  • Post-incident security architecture hardening

Who We Serve

Organizations experiencing an active breach who require senior-level leadership and decisive action. Breach counsel attorneys who need privileged forensic investigation. Enterprises seeking a principal-level incident commander — not a junior analyst following a playbook.

Our Process

Engagements begin with a direct consultation — typically within hours of initial contact, and often within minutes for active incidents. We establish scope, execute containment, and remain engaged through full remediation. Every engagement concludes with a comprehensive forensic report prepared for legal, insurance, and regulatory proceedings.

Key Capabilities

  • 24/7 Availability
  • Ransomware Response
  • BEC Investigation
  • Cloud IR (AWS/Azure/GCP)
  • Digital Forensics
  • Malware Analysis
  • Evidence Preservation
  • Regulatory Guidance

Relevant Credentials

  • Fortune 50 IR Experience
  • Log4j Response Veteran
  • DFIR Specialist
  • 26K+ Industry Following

Need Immediate Help?

If you're experiencing an active breach, don't wait — reach out now.

Get Help Now
